description.value:
Requirements You have at least one hand free. Your powerful limbs help anchor you to surfaces, allowing you to pull yourself through shallows and even lean your body almost parallel to the ground without falling over. You can choose to fall @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Prone]. You then either [[/act crawl]] 10 feet (if prone) or Stride up to your Speed (if not prone), ignoring difficult terrain caused by shallow water. If you're prone, you can then Stand.

Special If an ability (such as the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Nimble Crawl] skill feat) allows you to Crawl more than 10 feet as an action, you can instead Crawl up to that distance when you Shore Scuttle.
